mapper.update: update orders set status = 'DEDUCTING' where status = 'INIT' and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'DEDUCT_SUCCESS' where status in 'DEDUCTING' and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'DEDUCT_FAIL' where status = 'DEDUCTING' and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'CAN_PAY' where status = 'DEDUCT_SUCCESS' and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'PAY_INIT' where status in ('CAN_PAY', 'PAY_FAIL') and order_id = #{orderId}
update orders set status = 'PAY_PROCESSING' where status = 'PAY_INIT' and order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET status = 'PAY_SUCCESS', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PAY_PROCESSING'
UPDATE orders SET status = 'PAY_FAIL', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PAY_PROCESSING'
UPDATE orders SET status = 'FINAL_SUCCESS', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PAY_SUCCESS'
mapper.insert: insert into orders( order_id, user_id, sku_id, qty, status, create_time, update_time) values( #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{skuId}, #{qty}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = 'TIME_OUT_CANCEL', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status IN ( 'INIT', 'DEDUCTING', 'DEDUCT_SUCCESS', 'CAN_PAY', 'PAY_INIT', 'PAY_PROCESSING', 'PAY_FAIL' )
UPDATE orders SET status = 'ROLLBACK_INIT', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'TIME_OUT_CANCEL'
UPDATE orders SET status = 'ROLLBACK_PROCESSING', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'ROLLBACK_INIT'
UPDATE orders SET status = 'ROLLBACK_SUCCESS', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'ROLLBACK_PROCESSING'
UPDATE orders SET status = 'ROLLBACK_FAIL', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'ROLLBACK_PROCESSING'
